Home use

A hyperbaric chamber in your own house

The same certified hard-shell chambers we run in the clinic every day, used by Bryan Johnson and available in your home, whenever you want.

Get a quote View the models

The professional grade, now available at home.

The same HPO.TECH hard-shell chambers Thrive specifies for the home - also trusted across the NFL, alongside Bath Rugby, and chosen by Bryan Johnson for his own setup.

Buying for a clinic or a team? Commercial · Sport

Ownership

What owning one is actually like, day to day

No appointments, no travel, no working around a clinic's schedule. The chamber sits in your home and runs on yours - before work, after training, or last thing at night. Within a fortnight most owners stop treating it as an event and it just becomes part of the day.

It is specified to sit properly in the room, rather than looking like equipment that has been parked there.

Make it yours

It should look like it belongs in the room

The interior leather, the exterior finish, the detailing - specified to your home and to you. Your colours, a monogram, or no branding at all.

InteriorLeather, colour, trim
ExteriorRAL or automotive finish
DetailingMonogram, branding, or none
Explore the finishes
Installed worldwide

Homes we have put these into

HPO.TECH chambers are installed in private homes across North and South America, Europe, Middle East, Asia and Australasia. A few of them, below. Most HPO.TECH chambers are installed in the US, where we work with install and servicing teams run from Detroit, Michigan.

Michigan, USA
California, USA
Uppsala, Sweden
Dubai, UAE
Utah, USA
London, UK
The real thing

How this differs from a soft-shell bag at 1.3 ATA

Most chambers sold for the home are soft-shell bags that sit just above normal pressure. This is a rigid chamber that holds 2.0 to 2.4 ATA with a built-in oxygen supply, made and certified to the standards that apply to pressure equipment built for people. It is the same specification we run in the clinic.

See the science Read the buying guide
Specification
Delivered pressure 2.0–2.4 ATA the real working range, well above a soft-shell
ChamberRigid, certified
Oxygen supplyBIBS · Up to 100%
Certification includesCE · PED · ASME · NFPA

Bryan Johnson runs the HPO.TECH Zeugma chamber

Blueprint is probably the most documented self-experiment anyone has run on themselves, and hyperbaric oxygen is part of it. Johnson completed a full 60-session course and has put it near the top of the list of things he considers worth the time, which for someone who measures everything is a reasonably useful signal.

Zeugma · one seat · up to 2.4 ATA · the single-seat chamber in the HPO.TECH range

See the Zeugma

Bryan Johnson’s own Zeugma, in his home gym.

How it happens

From your floor plan to a working chamber

01

Specify

We work with you to assess your space and specify the right chamber for it - placement, access, and the structural and plant requirements.

02

Managed install

We manage the delivery & installation - shipping, customs, access into the property, and the finish.

03

Running

Commissioned, handed over, and backed by protocol guidance so it is useful from the first session.

Handled across the UK, Europe, the US and beyond - with US install and servicing teams run from Detroit, Michigan.
What the research measured

What the 2022 trial actually measured

In a blinded, placebo-controlled trial, trained masters athletes completed 40 sessions at the pressure these chambers reach. Aerobic capacity rose against placebo, and the mitochondria - the cell's own power plants - increased and worked harder.

Hadanny et al., 2022 · Sports Medicine - Open
See the science
Why Thrive

We run a hyperbaric clinic and use these chambers every day

Thrive founder David Gumbleton runs our hyperbaric clinic, and we use the same chambers you would own. Whether you are buying for your own house or specifying for a client, we handle it from specification through to handover, and you pay HPO.TECH directly at manufacturer prices.

Get in touch About Thrive

Cleared for medical use in Saudi Arabia & the UAE

Every HPO.TECH system holds full marketing authorisation from the Saudi Food & Drug Authority (SFDA) and is registered with the UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention (MOHAP).

See our certifications

The questions most people start with

Nearly everyone arrives with the same handful: what pressure do I actually need, why these chambers rather than something cheaper, what does it cost to run, and will it fit. Ask any of them. When you get to the room, a photo and a rough idea of who will use it is enough - we take it from there, and if a chamber is not right for you we will say so.

Thrive is the official HPO.TECH worldwide specialist. You pay HPO.TECH directly at manufacturer prices, so our specification, installation and support cost you nothing extra.
